audit_input.task_goal: make the one-legged hopper move forward while staying upright and controlled

audit_output.reason: The agent achieved high forward velocity and maintained an upright pose for the entire rollout, but the extremely low energy cost suggests an unnatural, low-effort locomotion strategy (e.g., sliding or stiff movement) that exploits the lack of an energy penalty. Without video, 'controlled' movement cannot be confirmed.
